series_metadata.series_description: All reports mandated by law to be created by the Ohio Board of Regents. This record series includes but is not limited to the annual report on the condition of higher education (see Ohio Revised Code 3333.032) as well as the reports required pursuant to Ohio Revised Code 3333.041.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Deliver an electronic version State Library. If OBR perceives that report has lasting significance research/policy making capabilities of OBR, maintain such significance no longer exists ; Paper: Deliver an electronic version State Library. If OBR perceives that report has lasting significance research/policy making capabilities of OBR, maintain such significance no longer exists
